source_inputs.use_in_this_artifact: Provide D2 semantic components, visual containers, and expanded renderer binding IDs for text sockets.
Provide E2 adapter scene IDs, visual grammar binding, and renderer adapter manifest IDs.
Provide Part E visual structure terms and non-card grammar modules.
Provide on-canvas copy roles, text budgets, and speaker/viewer routing intent.
Provide content quality watch items and approved content unit boundaries.

all slides using the same text layout
